```{=html}
          <div style="color:#78909C;font-size:0.88em;">คาดการณ์ปี 2030</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="font-size:0.65em;color:#3A5060;text-align:center;flex:0 0 auto;">
        Source: Microsoft Graph API · Extracted: 12 Apr 2026 · n = 951,904 files · Based on 10 OneDrive accounts · Confidential — Internal Use Only
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```




<!-- ═══ SLIDE 6a: ที่มา ═══ -->
## 📋 ข้อเสนอโครงการ {background-color="#0A1628"}

```{=html}
<style>
@keyframes dp2{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}50%{transform:scale(1.6);opacity:0.3;}}
@keyframes ab2{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(3px);}}
@keyframes sb2{0%{left:-100%;}100%{left:200%;}}
@keyframes agGlow1{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(239,83,80,0.4);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(239,83,80,0.9);}}
@keyframes agGlow2{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(0,188,212,0.4);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,188,212,0.9);}}
@keyframes agGlow3{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(124,77,255,0.4);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(124,77,255,0.9);}}
</style>

<div style="font-family:'Inter','Sarabun',sans-serif;font-size:0.64em;width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.3em;">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,188,212,0.1),rgba(124,77,255,0.07));border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.2);border-radius:9px;padding:0.35em 0.8em;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
    <div>
      <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-weight:800;font-size:1em;">โครงการพัฒนาระบบธรรมาภิบาลข้อมูลองค์กรด้วยปัญญาประดิษฐ์</div>
      <div style="color:#506070;font-size:0.82em;margin-top:0.05em;">ETDA Data Governance Policy Automation · ทุน ก.พ. 2569 · กลุ่มสาขา 1</div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:right;flex-shrink:0;">
      <div style="color:#FFB300;font-weight:700;">นางสาวธัญรดา โพธิ์พระรส</div>
      <div style="color:#505870;font-size:0.82em;">Data Scientist · ETDA</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Content -->
  <div style="display:flex;gap:0.45em;height:490px;">

    <!-- Left -->
    <div style="width:42%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.22em;overflow:hidden;">
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.22em;flex:0 0 auto;">
        <div style="border:1.5px solid rgba(30,136,229,0.3);border-radius:7px;overflow:hidden;background:#060e1e;">
          <div style="height:105px;overflow:hidden;"><img src="img/etda_gov.png" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top;display:block;" onerror="this.style.display='none'"></div>
          <div style="padding:0.18em 0.35em;border-top:1px solid rgba(30,136,229,0.2);">
            <div style="color:#1E88E5;font-weight:700;font-size:0.68em;">Data Governance Policy</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.58em;color:#FFA726;background:rgba(255,167,38,0.1);border-radius:3px;padding:0.04em 0.22em;display:inline-block;margin-top:0.04em;">⚠️ ยังไม่มีกลไก Auto Enforce</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="border:1.5px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.3);border-radius:7px;overflow:hidden;background:#060e1e;">
          <div style="height:105px;overflow:hidden;"><img src="img/doc_center.png" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top;display:block;" onerror="this.style.display='none'"></div>
          <div style="padding:0.18em 0.35em;border-top:1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.2);">
            <div style="color:#7C4DFF;font-weight:700;font-size:0.68em;">Document Center (เดิม)</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.58em;color:#EF5350;background:rgba(239,83,80,0.1);border-radius:3px;padding:0.04em 0.22em;display:inline-block;margin-top:0.04em;">❌ ไม่อัพเดท</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="flex:1;background:rgba(6,14,30,0.7);border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.12);border-radius:8px;padding:0.28em 0.38em;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.12em;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;flex:0 0 auto;">
          <div style="background:rgba(255,179,0,0.09);border:1.5px solid rgba(255,179,0,0.4);border-radius:6px;padding:0.12em 0.55em;text-align:center;position:relative;">
            <div style="font-size:0.65em;font-weight:800;color:#FFB300;">📋 Data Governance Policy</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.54em;color:#607080;">กฎ · แนวปฏิบัติ · นโยบาย</div>
            <div style="position:absolute;top:-3px;right:-3px;width:6px;height:6px;background:#00E676;border-radius:50%;animation:dp2 1.5s infinite;"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:center;font-size:0.6em;color:rgba(0,188,212,0.65);animation:ab2 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;flex:0 0 auto;">↓ แปลงเป็น AI Agents</div>

        <!-- Agent 1: Retention -->
        <div style="flex:1;background:rgba(239,83,80,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.25);border-radius:6px;padding:0.16em 0.28em;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
          <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:50%;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#EF5350,transparent);animation:sb2 2s linear infinite;"></div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.2em;margin-bottom:0.06em;">
            <div style="width:22px;height:22px;min-width:22px;background:rgba(239,83,80,0.15);border-radius:5px;border:1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.85em;animation:agGlow1 2s infinite;">⏳</div>
            <span style="color:#EF5350;font-weight:700;font-size:0.62em;">Retention Agent</span>
            <div id="r3-s" style="margin-left:auto;font-size:0.5em;color:#EF5350;font-weight:700;"></div>
          </div>
          <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.54em;line-height:1.4;padding-left:0.2em;">
            ตรวจอายุไฟล์ · เทียบ Retention Policy<br>
            ครบกำหนด → 🔔 แจ้ง Data Owner Approve Archive/ทำลาย
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Agent 2: Classification -->
        <div style="flex:1;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.25);border-radius:6px;padding:0.16em 0.28em;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
          <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:50%;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#00BCD4,transparent);animation:sb2 2.3s linear 0.3s infinite;"></div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.2em;margin-bottom:0.06em;">
            <div style="width:22px;height:22px;min-width:22px;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.15);border-radius:5px;border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.85em;animation:agGlow2 2s ease-in-out 0.5s infinite;">🔒</div>
            <span style="color:#00BCD4;font-weight:700;font-size:0.62em;">Classification Agent</span>
            <div id="c3-s" style="margin-left:auto;font-size:0.5em;color:#00BCD4;font-weight:700;"></div>
          </div>
          <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.54em;line-height:1.4;padding-left:0.2em;">
            อ่านเนื้อหา · NLP ประเมินชั้นความลับ<br>
            ติด Label: 🔴 ลับมาก / 🟡 ภายใน / 🔵 ทั่วไป
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Agent 3: DocType -->
        <div style="flex:1;background:rgba(124,77,255,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.22);border-radius:6px;padding:0.16em 0.28em;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
          <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:50%;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#7C4DFF,transparent);animation:sb2 1.9s linear 1.6s infinite;"></div>
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.2em;margin-bottom:0.06em;">
            <div style="width:22px;height:22px;min-width:22px;background:rgba(124,77,255,0.15);border-radius:5px;border:1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.85em;animation:agGlow3 2s ease-in-out 1s infinite;">🏷️</div>
            <span style="color:#7C4DFF;font-weight:700;font-size:0.62em;">DocType Agent</span>
            <div id="h3-s" style="margin-left:auto;font-size:0.5em;color:#7C4DFF;font-weight:700;"></div>
          </div>
          <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.54em;line-height:1.4;padding-left:0.2em;">
            วิเคราะห์โครงสร้างเอกสาร · ติดแท็กประเภท<br>
            บอร์ด · TOR · HR · ใบเสร็จ · นโยบาย → เชื่อม Data Catalog
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Right Canvas -->
    <div style="flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.2em;min-width:0;overflow:hidden;">
      <div style="font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;color:rgba(0,188,212,0.8);flex:0 0 auto;">👨‍💼 พนักงาน ETDA Upload ไฟล์ → AI Agents จัดการอัตโนมัติ</div>
      <div style="flex:1;background:rgba(4,10,24,0.95);border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.12);border-radius:9px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;">
        <canvas id="cv-main" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;"></canvas>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function(){
  const m={
    'r3-s':['🗑️ ทำลาย 3 ไฟล์','📦 Archive 12','⏳ ตรวจ 1,240'],
    'c3-s':['🔴 Conf:156','🟡 Internal:892','🔵 Public:234'],
    'h3-s':['🏷️ บอร์ด:45','💰 Finance:89','👥 HR:67']
  };
  let ix={};Object.keys(m).forEach(k=>ix[k]=0);
  setInterval(()=>{Object.keys(m).forEach(k=>{const el=document.getElementById(k);if(el){el.textContent=m[k][ix[k]%m[k].length];ix[k]++;}});},2200);
})();

(function(){
  const cv=document.getElementById('cv-main');if(!cv)return;
  const ctx=cv.getContext('2d');let W,H,t=0;
  function rsz(){W=cv.offsetWidth||600;H=cv.offsetHeight||320;cv.width=W;cv.height=H;}rsz();
  const pC=['#00BCD4','#7C4DFF','#00E676','#FFB300','#1E88E5','#EF5350','#FFA726','#26C6DA','#E91E63','#AB47BC','#4CAF50','#FF7043'];
  const depts=['DSD','DAC','DID','1212','IT','Legal','HR','Policy','Finance','Research','Sec','Admin'];
  const ft=[{em:'📋',col:'#00E676',tag:'Meeting'},{em:'💰',col:'#FFB300',tag:'Finance'},{em:'👥',col:'#7C4DFF',tag:'HR Doc'},{em:'🔒',col:'#EF5350',tag:'Conf.'},{em:'📄',col:'#00BCD4',tag:'Policy'}];
  const ag=[
    {label:'Retention',em:'⏳',col:'#EF5350',rx:0.82,ry:0.18},
    {label:'Classification',em:'🔒',col:'#00BCD4',rx:0.96,ry:0.50},
    {label:'DocType',em:'🏷️',col:'#7C4DFF',rx:0.82,ry:0.82}
  ];
  const persons=depts.map((d,i)=>({dept:d,col:pC[i],rx:0.03+(i%4)*0.085,ry:0.16+Math.floor(i/4)*0.30,phase:i*0.65,timer:Math.floor(Math.random()*55)+15}));
  let pk=[],tg=[];
  const ap=def=>({x:def.rx*W,y:def.ry*H});
  const od=()=>({x:W*0.50,y:H*0.50});
  const lerp=(a,b,u)=>a+(b-a)*Math.min(Math.max(u,0),1);
  const ease=x=>x<0.5?2*x*x:-1+(4-2*x)*x;

  function spawnPkt(pi){
    const p=persons[pi],o=od();
    pk.push({srcPI:pi,stage:'to-cloud',prog:0,x:p.rx*W,y:p.ry*H,sx:p.rx*W,sy:p.ry*H,
      ftIdx:Math.floor(Math.random()*ft.length),agIdx:Math.floor(Math.random()*ag.length),
      alpha:1,speed:0.013+Math.random()*0.008});
  }

  function drawPerson(x,y,col,dept){
    ctx.save();ctx.strokeStyle=col;ctx.lineWidth=1.4;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,6.5,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle=col+'25';ctx.fill();ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,y+6.5);ctx.lineTo(x,y+18);ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x-6,y+11);ctx.lineTo(x+6,y+11);ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,y+18);ctx.lineTo(x-5,y+27);ctx.moveTo(x,y+18);ctx.lineTo(x+5,y+27);ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle=col;ctx.font=`bold ${Math.max(6,W*0.015)}px Inter,sans-serif`;
    ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.fillText(dept,x,y+37);ctx.restore();
  }

  function drawCloud(x,y){
    ctx.save();const r=18+Math.sin(t*0.08)*2;
    const g=ctx.createRadialGradient(x,y,0,x,y,r*2.2);
    g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,188,212,0.15)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,188,212,0)');
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,r*2.2,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle=g;ctx.fill();
    ctx.shadowColor='#00BCD4';ctx.shadowBlur=10;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x-8,y+4,10,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.arc(x+8,y+4,10,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.arc(x,y-3,12,0,Math.PI*2);
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,188,212,0.12)';ctx.strokeStyle='#00BCD4';ctx.lineWidth=1.6;ctx.fill();ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle='#00BCD4';ctx.font=`bold ${Math.max(7,W*0.018)}px Inter,sans-serif`;
    ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.textBaseline='middle';ctx.fillText('OneDrive',x,y+21);ctx.restore();
  }

  function drawAgent(def,active){
    const{x,y}=ap(def);
    const boxW=62,boxH=48,bx=x-boxW/2,by=y-boxH/2;
    ctx.save();
    if(active){ctx.shadowColor=def.col;ctx.shadowBlur=18;}
    const grad=ctx.createLinearGradient(bx,by,bx,by+boxH);
    grad.addColorStop(0,def.col+'22');grad.addColorStop(1,def.col+'08');
    ctx.fillStyle=grad;ctx.strokeStyle=active?def.col:def.col+'88';
    ctx.lineWidth=active?2:1.2;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.roundRect(bx,by,boxW,boxH,8);ctx.fill();ctx.stroke();
    if(active){
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x,y-7,14,-Math.PI/2,-Math.PI/2+(t%48)*(Math.PI*2/48));
      ctx.strokeStyle=def.col+'66';ctx.lineWidth=2;ctx.stroke();
    }
    ctx.font=`${Math.max(14,W*0.03)}px serif`;
    ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.textBaseline='middle';
    ctx.fillText(def.em,x,y-7);
    ctx.fillStyle=def.col;
    ctx.font=`bold ${Math.max(7,W*0.014)}px Inter,sans-serif`;
    ctx.textBaseline='alphabetic';
    ctx.fillText(def.label,x,y+16);
    ctx.restore();
  }

  function drawPkt(p){
    const f=ft[p.ftIdx];ctx.save();ctx.globalAlpha=p.alpha;
    ctx.shadowColor=f.col;ctx.shadowBlur=6;
    ctx.fillStyle=f.col+'1a';ctx.strokeStyle=f.col;ctx.lineWidth=1.1;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.roundRect(p.x-7,p.y-8,14,18,3);ctx.fill();ctx.stroke();
    ctx.font=`${Math.max(8,W*0.02)}px serif`;ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.textBaseline='middle';
    ctx.fillText(f.em,p.x,p.y);ctx.restore();
  }

  function drawTag(tag){
    const f=ft[tag.ftIdx];ctx.save();ctx.globalAlpha=tag.alpha;
    ctx.fillStyle=f.col+'1a';ctx.strokeStyle=f.col;ctx.lineWidth=0.9;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.roundRect(tag.x-22,tag.y-6,44,13,6);ctx.fill();ctx.stroke();
    ctx.fillStyle=f.col;ctx.font=`bold ${Math.max(5,W*0.012)}px Inter,sans-serif`;
    ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.textBaseline='middle';ctx.fillText(f.tag,tag.x,tag.y);ctx.restore();
  }

  function frame(){
    rsz();ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);ctx.fillStyle='#040a18';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);
    ctx.font=`${Math.max(7,W*0.014)}px Inter,sans-serif`;ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.06)';
    ctx.textAlign='left';ctx.fillText('👨‍💼 พนักงาน',4,12);
    ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.fillText('☁️ OneDrive',W*0.50,12);
    ctx.textAlign='right';ctx.fillText('🤖 AI Agents',W-4,12);
    ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,188,212,0.06)';ctx.lineWidth=1;ctx.setLineDash([3,7]);
    [W*0.35,W*0.62].forEach(vx=>{ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(vx,17);ctx.lineTo(vx,H-6);ctx.stroke();});
    ctx.setLineDash([]);
    const o=od();
    ag.forEach(def=>{
      const a=ap(def);
      ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(o.x+20,o.y);ctx.lineTo(a.x-32,a.y);
      ctx.strokeStyle=def.col+'14';ctx.lineWidth=0.8;ctx.setLineDash([3,8]);ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]);
    });
    persons.forEach((p,i)=>{
      const y2=p.ry*H+Math.sin(t*0.04+p.phase)*2.5;
      p._cx=p.rx*W;p._cy=y2;
      p.timer--;if(p.timer<=0){spawnPkt(i);p.timer=40+Math.floor(Math.random()*60);}
      drawPerson(p._cx,y2,p.col,p.dept);
    });
    drawCloud(o.x,o.y);
    ag.forEach((def,i)=>{
      const active=pk.some(p=>p.stage==='to-agent'&&p.agIdx===i&&p.prog>0.4);
      drawAgent(def,active);
    });
    pk=pk.filter(p=>p.alpha>0.02);
    pk.forEach(p=>{
      if(p.stage==='to-cloud'){
        p.prog+=p.speed;
        const px=persons[p.srcPI];
        const sx=px._cx||px.rx*W,sy=px._cy||px.ry*H;
        p.x=lerp(sx,o.x,ease(p.prog));p.y=lerp(sy,o.y,ease(p.prog));
        if(p.prog>=1){p.prog=0;p.stage='to-agent';p.sx=o.x;p.sy=o.y;}
      } else {
        p.prog+=p.speed*0.82;
        const a=ap(ag[p.agIdx]);
        p.x=lerp(p.sx,a.x,ease(p.prog));p.y=lerp(p.sy,a.y,ease(p.prog));
        if(p.prog>=1){tg.push({x:a.x,y:a.y-28,ftIdx:p.ftIdx,alpha:1,vy:-0.5});p.alpha=0;}
      }
      drawPkt(p);
    });
    tg=tg.filter(t=>t.alpha>0.02);
    tg.forEach(t=>{t.y+=t.vy;t.vy*=0.97;t.alpha-=0.007;drawTag(t);});
    t++;requestAnimationFrame(frame);
  }
  frame();
})();
</script>
```


<!-- ═══ SLIDE 9: MOCK UP ═══ -->
## 🖥️ Mock Up {background-color="#0A1628"}

```{=html}
<style>
@keyframes agentPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(0,188,212,0.4);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,188,212,0.9);}}
@keyframes agentPulse2{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(124,77,255,0.4);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(124,77,255,0.9);}}
@keyframes agentPulse3{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(255,167,38,0.4);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(255,167,38,0.9);}}
@keyframes scanLine2{0%{transform:translateY(-100%);}100%{transform:translateY(500px);}}
@keyframes fileSlide{0%{transform:translateX(-20px);opacity:0;}100%{transform:translateX(0);opacity:1;}}
@keyframes spin{from{transform:rotate(0deg);}to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
@keyframes notifPop{0%{transform:translateY(10px);opacity:0;}100%{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1;}}
@keyframes shimmer{0%{background-position:-200% center;}100%{background-position:200% center;}}
@keyframes rowIn{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateX(10px);}100%{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);}}
</style>

<div style="font-family:'Inter','Sarabun',sans-serif;font-size:0.58em;">

<!-- Tabs: 4 -->
<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">
  <div id="btn-mock-1" onclick="changeMockup(1)" style="cursor:pointer;border-radius:9px;padding:0.45em;text-align:center;border:2px solid #EF5350;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(239,83,80,0.22),rgba(239,83,80,0.08));transition:0.3s;">
    <div style="font-size:1.2em;margin-bottom:0.05em;">⏳</div>
    <strong style="color:#EF5350;font-size:0.95em;">Retention Agent</strong>
    <div style="color:#8899aa;font-size:0.75em;margin-top:0.05em;">ตรวจอายุ · แจ้ง Owner</div>
  </div>
  <div id="btn-mock-2" onclick="changeMockup(2)" style="cursor:pointer;border-radius:9px;padding:0.45em;text-align:center;border:2px solid transparent;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);transition:0.3s;">
    <div style="font-size:1.2em;margin-bottom:0.05em;">🔒</div>
    <strong style="color:#00BCD4;font-size:0.95em;">Classification Agent</strong>
    <div style="color:#8899aa;font-size:0.75em;margin-top:0.05em;">จำแนกชั้นความลับ</div>
  </div>
  <div id="btn-mock-3" onclick="changeMockup(3)" style="cursor:pointer;border-radius:9px;padding:0.45em;text-align:center;border:2px solid transparent;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);transition:0.3s;">
    <div style="font-size:1.2em;margin-bottom:0.05em;">🏷️</div>
    <strong style="color:#7C4DFF;font-size:0.95em;">DocType Agent</strong>
    <div style="color:#8899aa;font-size:0.75em;margin-top:0.05em;">ติดแท็กประเภทเอกสาร</div>
  </div>
  <div id="btn-mock-4" onclick="changeMockup(4)" style="cursor:pointer;border-radius:9px;padding:0.45em;text-align:center;border:2px solid transparent;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);transition:0.3s;">
    <div style="font-size:1.2em;margin-bottom:0.05em;">🗂️</div>
    <strong style="color:#FFB300;font-size:0.95em;">Data Catalog</strong>
    <div style="color:#8899aa;font-size:0.75em;margin-top:0.05em;">ทะเบียนข้อมูลกลาง</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div style="border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.18);border-radius:12px;background:#080f20;height:420px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);">

<!-- ══ PANEL 1: RETENTION AGENT ══ -->
<div id="panel-mock-1" style="display:block;padding:0.9em;height:100%;box-sizing:border-box;">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:1em;font-weight:700;color:#FFF;">⏳ Retention Agent — ผู้พิทักษ์กาล</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:#506070;margin-top:0.05em;">ตรวจอายุไฟล์ · เทียบ Retention Policy · แจ้ง Data Owner เพื่อ Archive หรือทำลาย</div>
    </div>
    <span style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.15);border:1px solid #EF5350;color:#EF5350;padding:0.12em 0.6em;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;font-size:0.72em;animation:agentPulse 2s infinite;">● SCANNING</span>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;height:88%;">

    <!-- Left: File list with retention status -->
    <div style="background:rgba(6,14,30,0.8);border:1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.2);border-radius:9px;padding:0.6em;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.18em;overflow:hidden;">
      <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.1em;flex:0 0 auto;">📂 ไฟล์ที่ระบบตรวจพบ</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.6em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 0.8fr 1fr;gap:0.2em;color:#456070;padding:0 0.2em;flex:0 0 auto;">
        <div>ชื่อไฟล์</div><div>อายุ</div><div>สถานะ</div>
      </div>
      <div id="ret-list" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.12em;overflow:hidden;flex:1;"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Right: Action Panel -->
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.4em;">

      <!-- Agent Icon -->
      <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.08);border:1.5px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.35);border-radius:9px;padding:0.5em;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.2em;position:relative;overflow:hidden;flex:0 0 auto;">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1.5px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#EF5350,transparent);animation:scanLine2 2.5s linear infinite;"></div>
        <div style="position:relative;width:36px;height:36px;">
          <div style="position:absolute;inset:-3px;border:2px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.4);border-top-color:#EF5350;border-radius:50%;animation:spin 1.8s linear infinite;"></div>
          <div style="width:36px;height:36px;background:rgba(239,83,80,0.15);border-radius:50%;border:1px solid #EF5350;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2em;">⏳</div>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:#EF5350;font-weight:700;">Retention Agent</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#506070;">กำลังวิเคราะห์ทุกไฟล์</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Notification to Data Owner -->
      <div style="flex:1;background:rgba(6,14,30,0.8);border:1px solid rgba(255,167,38,0.2);border-radius:9px;padding:0.5em;overflow:hidden;">
        <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:#FFB300;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.2em;">📬 แจ้ง Data Owner</div>
        <div id="ret-notif" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.18em;"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Summary -->
      <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.2);border-radius:8px;padding:0.4em;flex:0 0 auto;">
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.2em;text-align:center;font-size:0.6em;">
          <div><div style="font-size:1.4em;font-weight:800;color:#EF5350;" id="ret-cnt-over">0</div><div style="color:#607080;">เกินกำหนด</div></div>
          <div><div style="font-size:1.4em;font-weight:800;color:#FFA726;" id="ret-cnt-soon">0</div><div style="color:#607080;">ใกล้ครบ</div></div>
          <div><div style="font-size:1.4em;font-weight:800;color:#00E676;" id="ret-cnt-ok">0</div><div style="color:#607080;">ปกติ</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ PANEL 2: CLASSIFICATION AGENT ══ -->
<div id="panel-mock-2" style="display:none;padding:0.9em;height:100%;box-sizing:border-box;">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:1em;font-weight:700;color:#FFF;">🔒 Classification Agent — ผู้จำแนกระดับ</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:#506070;margin-top:0.05em;">อ่านเนื้อหาไฟล์ · NLP ประเมินชั้นความลับ · ติด Label อัตโนมัติ</div>
    </div>
    <span style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.15);border:1px solid #00BCD4;color:#00BCD4;padding:0.12em 0.6em;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;font-size:0.72em;animation:agentPulse 2s infinite;">● READING</span>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;height:88%;">

    <!-- Left: Files with classification result -->
    <div style="background:rgba(6,14,30,0.8);border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.2);border-radius:9px;padding:0.6em;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.18em;overflow:hidden;">
      <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.1em;flex:0 0 auto;">📂 ผลการจำแนกชั้นความลับ</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.6em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 0.8fr;gap:0.2em;color:#456070;padding:0 0.2em;flex:0 0 auto;">
        <div>ชื่อไฟล์</div><div>ระดับ</div><div>Conf.</div>
      </div>
      <div id="cls-list" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.12em;overflow:hidden;flex:1;"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Right -->
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.4em;">
      <div style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.08);border:1.5px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.35);border-radius:9px;padding:0.5em;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.2em;position:relative;overflow:hidden;flex:0 0 auto;">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1.5px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#00BCD4,transparent);animation:scanLine2 2s linear infinite;"></div>
        <div style="position:relative;width:36px;height:36px;">
          <div style="position:absolute;inset:-3px;border:2px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.4);border-top-color:#00BCD4;border-radius:50%;animation:spin 1.5s linear infinite;"></div>
          <div style="width:36px;height:36px;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.15);border-radius:50%;border:1px solid #00BCD4;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2em;">🔒</div>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:#00BCD4;font-weight:700;">Classification Agent</div>
        <div id="cls-reading" style="font-size:0.52em;color:#456070;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;max-width:130px;"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Label distribution -->
      <div style="flex:1;background:rgba(6,14,30,0.8);border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.15);border-radius:9px;padding:0.5em;">
        <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:#B0BEC5;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.3em;">🛡️ สัดส่วนชั้นความลับ</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.28em;font-size:0.6em;">
          <div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;color:#EF5350;margin-bottom:0.1em;"><span>🔴 ลับมาก</span><span id="cls-r-pct">15%</span></div>
            <div style="background:#1a2a40;border-radius:3px;height:6px;"><div id="cls-r-bar" style="width:15%;height:100%;background:#EF5350;border-radius:3px;transition:width 0.5s;"></div></div>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;color:#FFA726;margin-bottom:0.1em;"><span>🟡 ภายใน</span><span id="cls-i-pct">52%</span></div>
            <div style="background:#1a2a40;border-radius:3px;height:6px;"><div id="cls-i-bar" style="width:52%;height:100%;background:#FFA726;border-radius:3px;transition:width 0.5s;"></div></div>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;color:#00BCD4;margin-bottom:0.1em;"><span>🔵 ทั่วไป</span><span id="cls-p-pct">33%</span></div>
            <div style="background:#1a2a40;border-radius:3px;height:6px;"><div id="cls-p-bar" style="width:33%;height:100%;background:#00BCD4;border-radius:3px;transition:width 0.5s;"></div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Accuracy -->
      <div style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.2);border-radius:8px;padding:0.4em;text-align:center;flex:0 0 auto;">
        <div style="font-size:1.6em;font-weight:800;color:#00E676;">94.2%</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.58em;color:#506070;">NLP Accuracy · Thai Language</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ PANEL 3: DOCTYPE AGENT ══ -->
<div id="panel-mock-3" style="display:none;padding:0.9em;height:100%;box-sizing:border-box;">
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
    <div>
      <div style="font-size:1em;font-weight:700;color:#FFF;">🏷️ DocType Agent — บรรณารักษา</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:#506070;margin-top:0.05em;">วิเคราะห์โครงสร้างเอกสาร · ติดแท็กประเภท · เชื่อม Data Catalog อัตโนมัติ</div>
    </div>
    <span style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.15);border:1px solid #7C4DFF;color:#9B72FF;padding:0.12em 0.6em;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;font-size:0.72em;animation:agentPulse2 2s infinite;">● TAGGING</span>
  </div>
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;height:88%;">

    <!-- Left: Files with doctype tags -->
    <div style="background:rgba(6,14,30,0.8);border:1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.2);border-radius:9px;padding:0.6em;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.18em;overflow:hidden;">
      <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.1em;flex:0 0 auto;">📂 ผลการติดแท็กประเภทเอกสาร</div>
      <div style="font-size:0.6em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 0.8fr;gap:0.2em;color:#456070;padding:0 0.2em;flex:0 0 auto;">
        <div>ชื่อไฟล์</div><div>ประเภท</div><div>Conf.</div>
      </div>
      <div id="doc-list" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.12em;overflow:hidden;flex:1;"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Right -->
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.4em;">
      <div style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.08);border:1.5px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.35);border-radius:9px;padding:0.5em;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.2em;position:relative;overflow:hidden;flex:0 0 auto;">
        <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1.5px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#7C4DFF,transparent);animation:scanLine2 2.2s linear infinite;"></div>
        <div style="position:relative;width:36px;height:36px;">
          <div style="position:absolute;inset:-3px;border:2px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.4);border-top-color:#7C4DFF;border-radius:50%;animation:spin 2s linear infinite;"></div>
          <div style="width:36px;height:36px;background:rgba(124,77,255,0.15);border-radius:50%;border:1px solid #7C4DFF;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.2em;">🏷️</div>
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:#7C4DFF;font-weight:700;">DocType Agent · บรรณารักษา</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.52em;color:#456070;">ติดแท็กอัตโนมัติทุกไฟล์</div>
      </div>

      <!-- DocType counts -->
      <div style="flex:1;background:rgba(6,14,30,0.8);border:1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.15);border-radius:9px;padding:0.5em;">
        <div style="font-size:0.62em;color:#B0BEC5;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.25em;">📊 ประเภทเอกสารที่พบ</div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.18em;font-size:0.6em;">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:rgba(255,179,0,0.06);border-radius:4px;padding:0.14em 0.35em;">
            <span style="color:#FFB300;">🤝 ประชุมบอร์ด</span><span id="doc-b" style="color:#FFB300;font-weight:700;">0</span>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:rgba(100,181,246,0.06);border-radius:4px;padding:0.14em 0.35em;">
            <span style="color:#64B5F6;">📝 TOR / ข้อกำหนด</span><span id="doc-t" style="color:#64B5F6;font-weight:700;">0</span>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:rgba(0,230,118,0.06);border-radius:4px;padding:0.14em 0.35em;">
            <span style="color:#00E676;">💵 ใบเสร็จรับเงิน</span><span id="doc-r" style="color:#00E676;font-weight:700;">0</span>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:rgba(124,77,255,0.06);border-radius:4px;padding:0.14em 0.35em;">
            <span style="color:#9B72FF;">👥 เอกสาร HR</span><span id="doc-h" style="color:#9B72FF;font-weight:700;">0</span>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border-radius:4px;padding:0.14em 0.35em;">
            <span style="color:#78909C;">📄 อื่นๆ</span><span id="doc-o" style="color:#78909C;font-weight:700;">0</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.07);border:1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.2);border-radius:8px;padding:0.4em;text-align:center;flex:0 0 auto;">
        <div style="font-size:1.6em;font-weight:800;color:#9B72FF;">91.8%</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.58em;color:#506070;">DocType Accuracy</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ PANEL 4: DATA CATALOG ══ -->
<div id="panel-mock-4" style="display:none;padding:0.9em;height:100%;box-sizing:border-box;flex-direction:column;gap:0.4em;">

  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex:0 0 auto;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;">
      <div style="width:26px;height:26px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FFB300,#F57C00);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.95em;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(255,179,0,0.4);">🗂️</div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:0.95em;font-weight:800;color:#FFF;">ETDA Data Catalog — ทะเบียนข้อมูลกลาง</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.56em;color:rgba(255,179,0,0.6);">ผลลัพธ์จาก AI Agents ทั้ง 3 ตัว · Governed by AI · Real-time</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:0.35em;">
      <input type="text" placeholder="🔍 ค้นหา..." style="width:140px;padding:0.25em 0.6em;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid rgba(255,179,0,0.3);background:rgba(6,14,30,0.8);color:#FFF;outline:none;font-size:0.62em;">
      <select style="background:rgba(6,14,30,0.8);border:1px solid rgba(255,179,0,0.25);border-radius:5px;color:#C0CDD8;padding:0.22em 0.35em;font-size:0.6em;">
        <option>ทุก Label</option><option>🔴 Conf.</option><option>🟡 Internal</option><option>🔵 Public</option>
      </select>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Table -->
  <div style="flex:1;background:rgba(4,10,24,0.9);border:1px solid rgba(255,179,0,0.12);border-radius:10px;overflow:auto;">
    <div style="position:sticky;top:0;z-index:10;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,179,0,0.15),rgba(255,167,38,0.08),rgba(255,179,0,0.15));border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,179,0,0.2);">
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.8fr 0.65fr 0.85fr 0.85fr 1fr 1fr 0.55fr;padding:0.4em 0.55em;gap:0.25em;font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#FFB300;letter-spacing:0.03em;">
        <div>Asset Name</div><div>Label</div><div>ประเภท</div><div>Data Owner</div><div>Data Location</div><div>Metadata</div><div style="text-align:center;">Status</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:0.15em 0;">

      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.8fr 0.65fr 0.85fr 0.85fr 1fr 1fr 0.55fr;padding:0.32em 0.55em;gap:0.25em;font-size:0.6em;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);align-items:center;transition:background 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(255,179,0,0.05)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='transparent'">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;overflow:hidden;"><span>📊</span><span style="color:#FFF;font-weight:600;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">1212 Complaint Dashboard</span></div>
        <div><span style="background:rgba(255,167,38,0.15);color:#FFA726;border:1px solid rgba(255,167,38,0.3);padding:0.08em 0.3em;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.88em;white-space:nowrap;">🟡</span></div>
        <div><span style="background:rgba(30,136,229,0.1);color:#64B5F6;padding:0.08em 0.3em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.88em;">📊 Dashboard</span></div>
        <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-size:0.9em;">ทีม DAC</div>
        <div style="color:#506070;font-size:0.88em;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">Power BI Workspace</div>
        <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.85em;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">Source: 1212.csv · Daily</div>
        <div style="text-align:center;color:#00E676;">✅</div>
      </div>

      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.8fr 0.65fr 0.85fr 0.85fr 1fr 1fr 0.55fr;padding:0.32em 0.55em;gap:0.25em;font-size:0.6em;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);align-items:center;background:rgba(239,83,80,0.02);transition:background 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(239,83,80,0.06)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='rgba(239,83,80,0.02)'">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;overflow:hidden;"><span>📊</span><span style="color:#FFF;font-weight:600;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">ThaiD Usage Dashboard</span></div>
        <div><span style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.15);color:#EF5350;border:1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.3);padding:0.08em 0.3em;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.88em;white-space:nowrap;">🔴</span></div>
        <div><span style="background:rgba(30,136,229,0.1);color:#64B5F6;padding:0.08em 0.3em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.88em;">📊 Dashboard</span></div>
        <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-size:0.9em;">ทีม DID</div>
        <div style="color:#506070;font-size:0.88em;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">Power BI Workspace</div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:0.2em;"><span style="background:rgba(255,179,0,0.15);color:#FFB300;padding:0.04em 0.25em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.82em;">⚠️ PII</span><span style="color:#607080;font-size:0.82em;">Monthly</span></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;color:#00E676;">✅</div>
      </div>

      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.8fr 0.65fr 0.85fr 0.85fr 1fr 1fr 0.55fr;padding:0.32em 0.55em;gap:0.25em;font-size:0.6em;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);align-items:center;transition:background 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(255,179,0,0.05)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='transparent'">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;overflow:hidden;"><span>📑</span><span style="color:#FFF;font-weight:600;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">ETDA Annual Report 2567</span></div>
        <div><span style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.12);color:#00BCD4;border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.28);padding:0.08em 0.3em;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.88em;white-space:nowrap;">🔵</span></div>
        <div><span style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.08);color:#00E676;padding:0.08em 0.3em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.88em;">📑 Official</span></div>
        <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-size:0.9em;">ฝ่ายสื่อสาร</div>
        <div style="color:#506070;font-size:0.88em;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">OneDrive/Publications/</div>
        <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.85em;white-space:nowrap;">PDF · 8.2MB · สาธารณะ</div>
        <div style="text-align:center;color:#00E676;">✅</div>
      </div>

      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.8fr 0.65fr 0.85fr 0.85fr 1fr 1fr 0.55fr;padding:0.32em 0.55em;gap:0.25em;font-size:0.6em;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);align-items:center;background:rgba(239,83,80,0.02);transition:background 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(239,83,80,0.06)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='rgba(239,83,80,0.02)'">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;overflow:hidden;"><span>💾</span><span style="color:#FFF;font-weight:600;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">ecommerce_data_2025.csv</span></div>
        <div><span style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.15);color:#EF5350;border:1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.3);padding:0.08em 0.3em;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.88em;white-space:nowrap;">🔴</span></div>
        <div><span style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.1);color:#9B72FF;padding:0.08em 0.3em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.88em;">💾 Dataset</span></div>
        <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-size:0.9em;">ทีม DAC</div>
        <div style="color:#506070;font-size:0.88em;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">OneDrive/DAC/ecom/</div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:0.2em;"><span style="background:rgba(255,179,0,0.15);color:#FFB300;padding:0.04em 0.25em;border-radius:3px;font-size:0.82em;">⚠️ PII</span><span style="color:#607080;font-size:0.82em;">2.3MB</span></div>
        <div style="text-align:center;color:#00E676;">✅</div>
      </div>

      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.8fr 0.65fr 0.85fr 0.85fr 1fr 1fr 0.55fr;padding:0.32em 0.55em;gap:0.25em;font-size:0.6em;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);align-items:center;transition:background 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(255,179,0,0.05)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='transparent'">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;overflow:hidden;"><span>📝</span><span style="color:#FFF;font-weight:600;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">TOR_จ้างพัฒนาระบบ_AI_2025.pdf</span></div>
        <div><span style="background:rgba(255,167,38,0.15);color:#FFA726;border:1px solid rgba(255,167,38,0.3);padding:0.08em 0.3em;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.88em;white-space:nowrap;">🟡</span></div>
        <div><span style="background:rgba(255,179,0,0.08);color:#FFB300;padding:0.08em 0.3em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.88em;">📝 เอกสาร</span></div>
        <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-size:0.9em;">ฝ่ายจัดซื้อ</div>
        <div style="color:#506070;font-size:0.88em;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">OneDrive/Procurement/</div>
        <div style="color:#607080;font-size:0.85em;white-space:nowrap;">234KB · มี.ค. 68</div>
        <div style="text-align:center;color:#00E676;">✅</div>
      </div>

      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.8fr 0.65fr 0.85fr 0.85fr 1fr 1fr 0.55fr;padding:0.32em 0.55em;gap:0.25em;font-size:0.6em;align-items:center;background:rgba(239,83,80,0.04);transition:background 0.2s;" onmouseover="this.style.background='rgba(239,83,80,0.09)'" onmouseout="this.style.background='rgba(239,83,80,0.04)'">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;overflow:hidden;"><span>🔑</span><span style="color:#EF8080;font-weight:600;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">server_config_backup_2022/</span></div>
        <div><span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);color:#78909C;padding:0.08em 0.3em;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.88em;white-space:nowrap;">⚪</span></div>
        <div><span style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.1);color:#EF5350;padding:0.08em 0.3em;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.88em;">🔑 Credential?</span></div>
        <div style="color:#EF5350;font-size:0.9em;">— ไม่ระบุ</div>
        <div style="color:#506070;font-size:0.88em;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">OneDrive/IT/backup/</div>
        <div style="color:#EF5350;font-size:0.85em;white-space:nowrap;">🚨 ไม่มี Policy</div>
        <div style="text-align:center;color:#EF5350;">❌</div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex:0 0 auto;">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:0.6em;font-size:0.56em;color:#506070;">
      <span><span style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.15);color:#EF5350;padding:0.04em 0.3em;border-radius:6px;">🔴</span> ลับมาก</span>
      <span><span style="background:rgba(255,167,38,0.15);color:#FFA726;padding:0.04em 0.3em;border-radius:6px;">🟡</span> ภายใน</span>
      <span><span style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.12);color:#00BCD4;padding:0.04em 0.3em;border-radius:6px;">🔵</span> ทั่วไป</span>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.54em;color:#3A5060;">📍 Graph API · Apr 2026 · Confidential</div>
  </div>

</div><!-- end panel 4 -->
</div><!-- end main box -->
</div><!-- end outer -->

<script>
const mc={
  1:{col:'#EF5350',rgb:'239,83,80'},
  2:{col:'#00BCD4',rgb:'0,188,212'},
  3:{col:'#7C4DFF',rgb:'124,77,255'},
  4:{col:'#FFB300',rgb:'255,179,0'}
};
function changeMockup(n){
  for(let i=1;i<=4;i++){
    const p=document.getElementById('panel-mock-'+i);
    if(p)p.style.display='none';
    const b=document.getElementById('btn-mock-'+i);
    if(b){b.style.border='2px solid transparent';b.style.background='rgba(255,255,255,0.04)';}
  }
  const p=document.getElementById('panel-mock-'+n);
  if(p)p.style.display=(n===4)?'flex':'block';
  const b=document.getElementById('btn-mock-'+n);const c=mc[n];
  if(b){b.style.border='2px solid '+c.col;b.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg,rgba('+c.rgb+',0.22),rgba('+c.rgb+',0.08))';}
}
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{changeMockup(1);startP1();startP2();startP3();});

/* ── Panel 1: Retention ── */
function startP1(){
  const files=[
    {name:'Budget_2018.xlsx',age:'7 ปี 2 เดือน',status:'🔴 เกินกำหนด',statusCol:'#EF5350',owner:'ฝ่ายการเงิน'},
    {name:'Staff_Dir_2019.csv',age:'6 ปี 8 เดือน',status:'🔴 เกินกำหนด',statusCol:'#EF5350',owner:'ฝ่าย HR'},
    {name:'Report_Q2_2022.pdf',age:'3 ปี 10 เดือน',status:'🟡 ใกล้ครบ',statusCol:'#FFA726',owner:'ทีม DAC'},
    {name:'MOU_Digital_2024.pdf',age:'1 ปี 2 เดือน',status:'✅ ปกติ',statusCol:'#00E676',owner:'Legal'},
    {name:'TOR_AI_2025.pdf',age:'4 เดือน',status:'✅ ปกติ',statusCol:'#00E676',owner:'ฝ่ายจัดซื้อ'},
    {name:'Complaint_Q1_2020.csv',age:'5 ปี 3 เดือน',status:'🟡 ใกล้ครบ',statusCol:'#FFA726',owner:'1212'},
  ];
  const notifs=[
    {msg:'📦 Budget_2018.xlsx ครบ 7 ปี',action:'→ รอ Approve Archive จาก CISO',col:'#EF5350'},
    {msg:'⚠️ Staff_Dir_2019.csv มี PII',action:'→ Force Review ก่อน Archive',col:'#7C4DFF'},
    {msg:'📋 Report_Q2_2022 ใกล้ครบ 4 ปี',action:'→ แจ้ง DAC Team ล่วงหน้า',col:'#FFA726'},
    {msg:'✅ MOU_2021.docx — Approved',action:'→ Archived เรียบร้อย',col:'#00E676'},
  ];
  let over=0,soon=0,ok=0;
  const list=document.getElementById('ret-list');
  const notifEl=document.getElementById('ret-notif');
  let fi=0,ni=0;

  files.forEach(f=>{
    if(f.status.includes('🔴'))over++;
    else if(f.status.includes('🟡'))soon++;
    else ok++;
    const row=document.createElement('div');
    row.style.cssText='display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 0.8fr 1fr;gap:0.15em;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);border-radius:4px;padding:0.12em 0.2em;font-size:0.58em;align-items:center;animation:rowIn 0.4s ease;';
    row.innerHTML=`<span style="color:#A0B4C8;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">${f.name}</span><span style="color:#607080;">${f.age}</span><span style="color:${f.statusCol};font-weight:600;font-size:0.9em;">${f.status}</span>`;
    list.appendChild(row);
  });
  document.getElementById('ret-cnt-over').textContent=over;
  document.getElementById('ret-cnt-soon').textContent=soon;
  document.getElementById('ret-cnt-ok').textContent=ok;

  function addNotif(){
    const n=notifs[ni%notifs.length];ni++;
    const div=document.createElement('div');
    div.style.cssText=`background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);border-left:2px solid ${n.col};border-radius:0 5px 5px 0;padding:0.2em 0.35em;animation:notifPop 0.4s ease;`;
    div.innerHTML=`<div style="font-size:0.6em;color:${n.col};font-weight:600;">${n.msg}</div><div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#456070;">${n.action}</div>`;
    notifEl.insertBefore(div,notifEl.firstChild);
    if(notifEl.children.length>3)notifEl.removeChild(notifEl.lastChild);
  }
  addNotif();setInterval(addNotif,2800);
}

/* ── Panel 2: Classification ── */
function startP2(){
  const files=[
    {name:'Budget_Q4_2025.xlsx',label:'🔴 ลับมาก',labelCol:'#EF5350',conf:'94%'},
    {name:'Staff_2025.csv',label:'🔴 ลับมาก',labelCol:'#EF5350',conf:'97%'},
    {name:'TOR_AI_2025.pdf',label:'🟡 ภายใน',labelCol:'#FFA726',conf:'89%'},
    {name:'ETDA_Report_2567.pdf',label:'🔵 ทั่วไป',labelCol:'#00BCD4',conf:'99%'},
    {name:'Board_Mar_2568.docx',label:'🟡 ภายใน',labelCol:'#FFA726',conf:'91%'},
    {name:'1212_Complaint.csv',label:'🔴 ลับมาก',labelCol:'#EF5350',conf:'96%'},
  ];
  const list=document.getElementById('cls-list');
  files.forEach((f,i)=>{
    setTimeout(()=>{
      const row=document.createElement('div');
      row.style.cssText='display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 0.8fr;gap:0.15em;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);border-radius:4px;padding:0.12em 0.2em;font-size:0.58em;align-items:center;animation:rowIn 0.4s ease;';
      row.innerHTML=`<span style="color:#A0B4C8;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">${f.name}</span><span style="color:${f.labelCol};font-weight:600;">${f.label}</span><span style="color:#607080;">${f.conf}</span>`;
      list.appendChild(row);
      document.getElementById('cls-reading').textContent=f.name;
    },i*600);
  });
}

/* ── Panel 3: DocType ── */
function startP3(){
  const files=[
    {name:'Board_Meeting_Mar.docx',type:'🤝 ประชุมบอร์ด',typeCol:'#FFB300',conf:'92%'},
    {name:'TOR_จ้างพัฒนา.pdf',type:'📝 TOR',typeCol:'#64B5F6',conf:'88%'},
    {name:'ใบเสร็จ_001.pdf',type:'💵 ใบเสร็จ',typeCol:'#00E676',conf:'97%'},
    {name:'HR_Contract_2025.pdf',type:'👥 HR Doc',typeCol:'#9B72FF',conf:'94%'},
    {name:'1212_Q1.csv',type:'📄 อื่นๆ',typeCol:'#78909C',conf:'78%'},
    {name:'Budget_Q4.xlsx',type:'📄 อื่นๆ',typeCol:'#78909C',conf:'72%'},
  ];
  const cnts={b:0,t:0,r:0,h:0,o:0};
  const list=document.getElementById('doc-list');
  files.forEach((f,i)=>{
    setTimeout(()=>{
      const row=document.createElement('div');
      row.style.cssText='display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 0.8fr;gap:0.15em;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.02);border-radius:4px;padding:0.12em 0.2em;font-size:0.58em;align-items:center;animation:rowIn 0.4s ease;';
      row.innerHTML=`<span style="color:#A0B4C8;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">${f.name}</span><span style="color:${f.typeCol};font-weight:600;font-size:0.88em;">${f.type}</span><span style="color:#607080;">${f.conf}</span>`;
      list.appendChild(row);
      if(f.type.includes('ประชุม'))cnts.b++;
      else if(f.type.includes('TOR'))cnts.t++;
      else if(f.type.includes('ใบเสร็จ'))cnts.r++;
      else if(f.type.includes('HR'))cnts.h++;
      else cnts.o++;
      document.getElementById('doc-b').textContent=cnts.b;
      document.getElementById('doc-t').textContent=cnts.t;
      document.getElementById('doc-r').textContent=cnts.r;
      document.getElementById('doc-h').textContent=cnts.h;
      document.getElementById('doc-o').textContent=cnts.o;
    },i*700);
  });
}
</script>
```


<!-- ═══ SLIDE 10: IMPLEMENTATION PLAN ═══ -->
## 📅 แผนการดำเนินงาน (Implementation Plan) {background-color="#0A1628"}

```{=html}
<div style="font-family:'Inter','Sarabun',sans-serif;font-size:0.52em;height:92%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.25em;overflow:hidden;">

  <!-- Title -->
  <div style="text-align:center;flex:0 0 auto;">
    <span style="color:#FFB300;font-weight:800;font-size:1.05em;">Roadmap 12 เดือน</span>
    <span style="color:#506070;margin-left:0.5em;">· หลังสำเร็จการศึกษา</span>
  </div>

  <!-- Main Grid -->
  <div style="flex:1;background:rgba(8,18,40,0.8);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:0;">

    <!-- Month header -->
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:140px repeat(12,1fr);background:rgba(0,188,212,0.08);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.15);flex:0 0 auto;">
      <div style="padding:0.35em 0.6em;font-size:0.72em;font-weight:700;color:#00BCD4;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);">Phase</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0;font-size:0.65em;color:#456070;font-weight:600;">M1</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0;font-size:0.65em;color:#456070;font-weight:600;">M2</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0;font-size:0.65em;color:#456070;font-weight:600;">M3</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0;font-size:0.65em;color:#456070;font-weight:600;">M4</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0;font-size:0.65em;color:#456070;font-weight:600;">M5</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0;font-size:0.65em;color:#456070;font-weight:600;">M6</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0;font-size:0.65em;color:#456070;font-weight:600;">M7</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0;font-size:0.65em;color:#456070;font-weight:600;">M8</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0;font-size:0.65em;color:#456070;font-weight:600;">M9</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0;font-size:0.65em;color:#456070;font-weight:600;">M10</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0;font-size:0.65em;color:#456070;font-weight:600;">M11</div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0;font-size:0.65em;color:#456070;font-weight:600;">M12</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Phase rows: flex:1 each to divide equally -->
    <div style="flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;min-height:0;">

      <!-- ── PHASE 1 ── -->
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:140px repeat(12,1fr);flex:1;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);min-height:0;">
        <div style="padding:0.4em 0.6em;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;background:rgba(30,136,229,0.04);">
          <div style="color:#1E88E5;font-weight:800;font-size:0.9em;">🔍 Phase 1</div>
          <div style="color:#1E88E5;font-size:0.65em;opacity:0.75;">M1–2 · Discovery</div>
        </div>
        <div style="grid-column:2/4;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(21,101,192,0.92),rgba(30,136,229,0.88));margin:0.35em 0.15em;border-radius:6px;padding:0.28em 0.45em;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(30,136,229,0.3);">
          <div style="color:#FFF;font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;line-height:1.3;">🔗 เชื่อม Microsoft Graph API</div>
          <div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.3;">📊 Metadata Analysis & Data Profiling</div>
          <div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.3;">🗺️ Data Map + Current State Dashboard</div>
        </div>
        <div style="grid-column:4/14;margin:0.35em 0.15em;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.01);border-radius:6px;border:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.04);"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- ── PHASE 2 ── -->
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:140px repeat(12,1fr);flex:1;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);min-height:0;">
        <div style="padding:0.4em 0.6em;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;background:rgba(255,167,38,0.03);">
          <div style="color:#FFA726;font-weight:800;font-size:0.9em;">🧹 Phase 2</div>
          <div style="color:#FFA726;font-size:0.65em;opacity:0.75;">M3–4 · Cleanup</div>
        </div>
        <div style="grid-column:2/4;margin:0.35em 0.15em;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.01);border-radius:6px;border:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.04);"></div>
        <div style="grid-column:4/6;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(230,81,0,0.92),rgba(255,167,38,0.88));margin:0.35em 0.15em;border-radius:6px;padding:0.28em 0.45em;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(255,167,38,0.3);">
          <div style="color:#0A1628;font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;line-height:1.3;">🔍 SHA-256 Deduplication</div>
          <div style="color:rgba(10,22,40,0.85);font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.3;">🗑️ ลบไฟล์ซ้ำและไฟล์ขยะ</div>
          <div style="color:rgba(10,22,40,0.85);font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.3;">📦 นำร่อง Archive + Force Encrypt PII</div>
        </div>
        <div style="grid-column:6/14;margin:0.35em 0.15em;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.01);border-radius:6px;border:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.04);"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- ── PHASE 3 ── -->
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:140px repeat(12,1fr);flex:1;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);min-height:0;">
        <div style="padding:0.4em 0.6em;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;background:rgba(124,77,255,0.04);">
          <div style="color:#7C4DFF;font-weight:800;font-size:0.9em;">🤖 Phase 3</div>
          <div style="color:#7C4DFF;font-size:0.65em;opacity:0.75;">M5–10 · AI Classification</div>
        </div>
        <div style="grid-column:2/6;margin:0.35em 0.15em;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.01);border-radius:6px;border:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.04);"></div>
        <div style="grid-column:6/12;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(69,39,160,0.92),rgba(124,77,255,0.88));margin:0.35em 0.15em;border-radius:6px;padding:0.28em 0.5em;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(124,77,255,0.35);">
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0 0.4em;">
            <div style="color:#FFF;font-size:0.63em;font-weight:700;line-height:1.3;">🧠 Fine-tune NLP Thai Model</div>
            <div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.3;">🔒 Classification Agent (Public/Internal/Conf.)</div>
            <div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.3;">🏷️ DocType Agent (บอร์ด/TOR/HR/ใบเสร็จ)</div>
            <div style="color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.3;">⚡ Auto-Label via Graph API + Human Review</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="grid-column:12/14;margin:0.35em 0.15em;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.01);border-radius:6px;border:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.04);"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- ── PHASE 4 ── -->
      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:140px repeat(12,1fr);flex:1;min-height:0;">
        <div style="padding:0.4em 0.6em;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;background:rgba(0,230,118,0.03);">
          <div style="color:#00E676;font-weight:800;font-size:0.9em;">📋 Phase 4</div>
          <div style="color:#00E676;font-size:0.65em;opacity:0.75;">M11–12 · Catalog</div>
        </div>
        <div style="grid-column:2/12;margin:0.35em 0.15em;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.01);border-radius:6px;border:1px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.04);"></div>
        <div style="grid-column:12/14;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(0,105,92,0.92),rgba(0,230,118,0.88));margin:0.35em 0.15em;border-radius:6px;padding:0.28em 0.45em;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,230,118,0.3);">
          <div style="color:#0A1628;font-size:0.63em;font-weight:700;line-height:1.3;">🗂️ Data Catalog กลาง</div>
          <div style="color:rgba(10,22,40,0.85);font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.3;">⏳ Lifecycle Workflow Auto</div>
          <div style="color:rgba(10,22,40,0.85);font-size:0.6em;line-height:1.3;">📊 Governance Dashboard</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Footer -->
  <div style="display:flex;gap:0.3em;flex:0 0 auto;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:nowrap;">
    <span style="background:rgba(0,188,212,0.08);color:#00BCD4;border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.2);padding:0.1em 0.45em;border-radius:10px;font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;">⚙️ Graph API</span>
    <span style="background:rgba(124,77,255,0.08);color:#9B72FF;border:1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.2);padding:0.1em 0.45em;border-radius:10px;font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;">🧠 Python NLP & LLMs</span>
    <span style="background:rgba(255,179,0,0.08);color:#FFB300;border:1px solid rgba(255,179,0,0.2);padding:0.1em 0.45em;border-radius:10px;font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;">📊 Power BI</span>
    <span style="background:rgba(30,136,229,0.08);color:#64B5F6;border:1px solid rgba(30,136,229,0.2);padding:0.1em 0.45em;border-radius:10px;font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;">☁️ Azure Storage</span>
    <span style="background:rgba(0,230,118,0.08);color:#00E676;border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.2);padding:0.1em 0.45em;border-radius:10px;font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap;">💰 Zero New Budget</span>
  </div>

</div>
```

<!-- ═══ SLIDE 6b: วัตถุประสงค์ & ประโยชน์ ═══ -->
## 📋 ข้อเสนอโครงการ — วัตถุประสงค์ & ประโยชน์ {background-color="#0A1628"}

```{=html}
<div style="font-family:'Inter','Sarabun',sans-serif;font-size:0.72em;width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.4em;">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,188,212,0.1),rgba(124,77,255,0.07));border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.2);border-radius:9px;padding:0.38em 0.8em;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
    <div>
      <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-weight:800;font-size:1em;">โครงการพัฒนาระบบธรรมาภิบาลข้อมูลองค์กรด้วยปัญญาประดิษฐ์</div>
      <div style="color:#506070;font-size:0.82em;margin-top:0.05em;">ETDA Data Governance Policy Automation · ทุน ก.พ. 2569 · กลุ่มสาขา 1</div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:right;flex-shrink:0;">
      <div style="color:#FFB300;font-weight:700;">นางสาวธัญรดา โพธิ์พระรส</div>
      <div style="color:#505870;font-size:0.82em;">Data Scientist · ETDA</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Body -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;">

    <!-- วัตถุประสงค์ -->
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.42em;margin-bottom:0.22em;padding-bottom:0.16em;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.18);">
        <div style="width:30px;height:30px;min-width:30px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#00BCD4,#0288D1);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1em;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,188,212,0.4);">🎯</div>
        <div>
          <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-weight:800;font-size:0.95em;">วัตถุประสงค์หลัก</div>
          <div style="color:rgba(0,188,212,0.5);font-size:0.58em;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.04em;">OBJECTIVES</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.14em;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.06);border-left:2px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.4);border-radius:0 7px 7px 0;padding:0.26em 0.5em;">
          <span style="width:18px;height:18px;min-width:18px;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.2);border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.56em;color:#00BCD4;font-weight:800;flex-shrink:0;">1</span>
          <span style="font-size:0.84em;color:#A0B4C8;line-height:1.35;">พัฒนา <strong style="color:#00BCD4;">Automation</strong> แปลงนโยบาย Data Governance ให้บังคับใช้ได้จริง</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.06);border-left:2px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.4);border-radius:0 7px 7px 0;padding:0.26em 0.5em;">
          <span style="width:18px;height:18px;min-width:18px;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.2);border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.56em;color:#00BCD4;font-weight:800;flex-shrink:0;">2</span>
          <span style="font-size:0.84em;color:#A0B4C8;line-height:1.35;">ยกระดับ <strong style="color:#00BCD4;">Policy Enforcement</strong> ให้สม่ำเสมอทั่วองค์กร ลด Manual Process</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.06);border-left:2px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.4);border-radius:0 7px 7px 0;padding:0.26em 0.5em;">
          <span style="width:18px;height:18px;min-width:18px;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.2);border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.56em;color:#00BCD4;font-weight:800;flex-shrink:0;">3</span>
          <span style="font-size:0.84em;color:#A0B4C8;line-height:1.35;">พัฒนา <strong style="color:#00BCD4;">AI Auto-Classification</strong> จำแนกชั้นความลับ + ประเภทเอกสาร + Retention</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.06);border-left:2px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.4);border-radius:0 7px 7px 0;padding:0.26em 0.5em;">
          <span style="width:18px;height:18px;min-width:18px;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.2);border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.56em;color:#00BCD4;font-weight:800;flex-shrink:0;">4</span>
          <span style="font-size:0.84em;color:#A0B4C8;line-height:1.35;">สร้าง <strong style="color:#00BCD4;">Data Catalog</strong> กลาง แสดงสถานะข้อมูลและ Compliance แบบ Real-time</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.06);border-left:2px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.4);border-radius:0 7px 7px 0;padding:0.26em 0.5em;">
          <span style="width:18px;height:18px;min-width:18px;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.2);border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.56em;color:#00BCD4;font-weight:800;flex-shrink:0;">5</span>
          <span style="font-size:0.84em;color:#A0B4C8;line-height:1.35;">วางรากฐานสู่ <strong style="color:#00BCD4;">Data-Driven Organization</strong> ที่ยั่งยืน</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ประโยชน์ -->
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.42em;margin-bottom:0.22em;padding-bottom:0.16em;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.18);">
        <div style="width:30px;height:30px;min-width:30px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#00E676,#00C853);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1em;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,230,118,0.35);">💡</div>
        <div>
          <div style="color:#00E676;font-weight:800;font-size:0.95em;">ประโยชน์ที่คาดว่าจะได้รับ</div>
          <div style="color:rgba(0,230,118,0.5);font-size:0.58em;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.04em;">EXPECTED BENEFITS</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.14em;">

        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.42em;background:rgba(0,188,212,0.06);border-left:2px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.38);border-radius:0 7px 7px 0;padding:0.26em 0.5em;">
          <span style="font-size:1.2em;flex-shrink:0;">⚙️</span>
          <div style="min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.82em;color:#00BCD4;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">นโยบายถูกบังคับใช้จริงทั่วองค์กร</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#456070;line-height:1.3;">Automation จัดการ Lifecycle ครบวงจร ไม่ต้องพึ่ง Manual</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.42em;background:rgba(0,230,118,0.05);border-left:2px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.38);border-radius:0 7px 7px 0;padding:0.26em 0.5em;">
          <span style="font-size:1.2em;flex-shrink:0;">✅</span>
          <div style="min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.82em;color:#00E676;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">คุณภาพข้อมูลและความพร้อมใช้งานเพิ่มขึ้น</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#456070;line-height:1.3;">ติด Label อัตโนมัติ ระบุผู้รับผิดชอบได้ ลดข้อมูลซ้ำซ้อน</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.42em;background:rgba(124,77,255,0.05);border-left:2px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.38);border-radius:0 7px 7px 0;padding:0.26em 0.5em;">
          <span style="font-size:1.2em;flex-shrink:0;">🗂️</span>
          <div style="min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.82em;color:#9B72FF;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">ค้นหาและเข้าถึงข้อมูลได้เร็วขึ้น</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#456070;line-height:1.3;">Data Catalog บอกแหล่งจัดเก็บ เจ้าของ และสถานะทันที</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.42em;background:rgba(255,179,0,0.05);border-left:2px solid rgba(255,179,0,0.38);border-radius:0 7px 7px 0;padding:0.26em 0.5em;">
          <span style="font-size:1.2em;flex-shrink:0;">🚀</span>
          <div style="min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.82em;color:#FFB300;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">รากฐานสู่ Data-Driven Organization</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#456070;line-height:1.3;">ข้อมูลสะอาด พร้อมต่อยอด Analytics และ AI ได้ทันที</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.42em;background:rgba(239,83,80,0.05);border-left:2px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.38);border-radius:0 7px 7px 0;padding:0.26em 0.5em;">
          <span style="font-size:1.2em;flex-shrink:0;">🔒</span>
          <div style="min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.82em;color:#EF8080;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">ลดความเสี่ยง PDPA & Data Leak</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#456070;line-height:1.3;">PII ถูกตรวจจับและจัดการอัตโนมัติตั้งแต่ต้น</div>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```


<!-- ═══ SLIDE 6c: Output · Outcome · ผู้ได้รับประโยชน์ ═══ -->
## 📋 ข้อเสนอโครงการ — Output · Outcome · ผู้ได้รับประโยชน์ {background-color="#0A1628"}

```{=html}
<div style="font-family:'Inter','Sarabun',sans-serif;font-size:0.68em;width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.4em;">

  <!-- Header -->
  <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,188,212,0.1),rgba(124,77,255,0.07));border:1px solid rgba(0,188,212,0.2);border-radius:9px;padding:0.38em 0.8em;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
    <div>
      <div style="color:#00BCD4;font-weight:800;font-size:1em;">โครงการพัฒนาระบบธรรมาภิบาลข้อมูลองค์กรด้วยปัญญาประดิษฐ์</div>
      <div style="color:#506070;font-size:0.82em;margin-top:0.05em;">ETDA Data Governance Policy Automation · ทุน ก.พ. 2569 · กลุ่มสาขา 1</div>
    </div>
    <div style="text-align:right;flex-shrink:0;">
      <div style="color:#FFB300;font-weight:700;">นางสาวธัญรดา โพธิ์พระรส</div>
      <div style="color:#505870;font-size:0.82em;">Data Scientist · ETDA</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Body: 2 columns -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.5em;">

    <!-- Output -->
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;margin-bottom:0.18em;padding-bottom:0.14em;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.2);">
        <div style="width:26px;height:26px;min-width:26px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7C4DFF,#5E35B1);border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.9em;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(124,77,255,0.4);">📦</div>
        <div>
          <div style="color:#B39DFF;font-weight:800;font-size:0.92em;">Output <span style="color:rgba(124,77,255,0.5);font-size:0.8em;font-weight:400;">(ผลผลิต)</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.12em;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;background:rgba(124,77,255,0.06);border-left:2px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.38);border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:0.28em 0.45em;">
          <span style="font-size:1.1em;flex-shrink:0;">📊</span>
          <div style="min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.82em;color:#B39DFF;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">Current State Assessment</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#456070;line-height:1.3;">วัด Gap สถานะปัจจุบัน vs นโยบาย</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;background:rgba(124,77,255,0.06);border-left:2px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.38);border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:0.28em 0.45em;">
          <span style="font-size:1.1em;flex-shrink:0;">🏷️</span>
          <div style="min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.82em;color:#B39DFF;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">AI Auto-Classification & Labelling</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#456070;line-height:1.3;">Public / Internal / Conf. + ประเภท + Retention</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;background:rgba(124,77,255,0.06);border-left:2px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.38);border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:0.28em 0.45em;">
          <span style="font-size:1.1em;flex-shrink:0;">⏳</span>
          <div style="min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.82em;color:#B39DFF;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">Automated Lifecycle Workflow</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#456070;line-height:1.3;">แจ้งเตือน Data Owner · Archive อัตโนมัติ</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;background:rgba(124,77,255,0.06);border-left:2px solid rgba(124,77,255,0.38);border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:0.28em 0.45em;">
          <span style="font-size:1.1em;flex-shrink:0;">🗂️</span>
          <div style="min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.82em;color:#B39DFF;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">Data Catalog + Gov. Dashboard</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#456070;line-height:1.3;">Compliance Real-time · รู้แหล่ง · รู้เจ้าของ</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Outcome -->
    <div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;margin-bottom:0.18em;padding-bottom:0.14em;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.2);">
        <div style="width:26px;height:26px;min-width:26px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#00E676,#00C853);border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.9em;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,230,118,0.35);">🌱</div>
        <div>
          <div style="color:#00E676;font-weight:800;font-size:0.92em;">Outcome <span style="color:rgba(0,230,118,0.5);font-size:0.8em;font-weight:400;">(ผลลัพธ์)</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.12em;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;background:rgba(0,230,118,0.05);border-left:2px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.32);border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:0.28em 0.45em;">
          <span style="font-size:1.1em;flex-shrink:0;">🏛️</span>
          <div style="min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.82em;color:#00E676;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">Improved Data Governance</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#456070;line-height:1.3;">กำกับชัดเจน ลด Silo บทบาท Owner/Steward ชัด</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;background:rgba(0,230,118,0.05);border-left:2px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.32);border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:0.28em 0.45em;">
          <span style="font-size:1.1em;flex-shrink:0;">✨</span>
          <div style="min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.82em;color:#00E676;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">Better Data Quality & Usability</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#456070;line-height:1.3;">ลดซ้ำซ้อน มีหมวดหมู่ ค้นหาง่าย ใช้ได้เลย</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;background:rgba(0,230,118,0.05);border-left:2px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.32);border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:0.28em 0.45em;">
          <span style="font-size:1.1em;flex-shrink:0;">🤖</span>
          <div style="min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.82em;color:#00E676;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">Future AI Readiness</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#456070;line-height:1.3;">ฐานข้อมูลพร้อมต่อยอด Analytics และ AI ได้ทันที</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.38em;background:rgba(0,230,118,0.05);border-left:2px solid rgba(0,230,118,0.32);border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:0.28em 0.45em;">
          <span style="font-size:1.1em;flex-shrink:0;">📈</span>
          <div style="min-width:0;">
            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.82em;color:#00E676;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;">Operational Efficiency</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#456070;line-height:1.3;">ลดเวลาค้นหา ลดภาระ Manual ลดต้นทุนแฝง</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- Stakeholders: horizontal bottom -->
  <div style="background:rgba(8,18,40,0.6);border:1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.22);border-radius:10px;padding:0.5em 0.65em;">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.35em;margin-bottom:0.32em;">
      <div style="width:22px;height:22px;min-width:22px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EF5350,#C62828);border-radius:5px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.8em;">👥</div>
      <div style="color:#EF8080;font-weight:800;font-size:0.76em;">ผู้ได้รับประโยชน์ <span style="color:rgba(239,83,80,0.5);font-weight:400;">· Stakeholders</span></div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:0.4em;">

      <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.18);border-radius:9px;padding:0.45em 0.4em;text-align:center;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.15em;">
        <div style="width:38px;height:38px;background:rgba(239,83,80,0.12);border-radius:9px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.3em;">👨‍💼</div>
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.68em;color:#EF9090;line-height:1.25;">ทีม Data<br>Governance</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#406070;line-height:1.25;">Enforce นโยบาย<br>ลดภาระ Manual</div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.18);border-radius:9px;padding:0.45em 0.4em;text-align:center;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.15em;">
        <div style="width:38px;height:38px;background:rgba(239,83,80,0.12);border-radius:9px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.3em;">🗝️</div>
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.68em;color:#EF9090;line-height:1.25;">Data Owner<br>/ Steward</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#406070;line-height:1.25;">รู้สถานะข้อมูล<br>มี Alert แจ้งเตือน</div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.18);border-radius:9px;padding:0.45em 0.4em;text-align:center;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.15em;">
        <div style="width:38px;height:38px;background:rgba(239,83,80,0.12);border-radius:9px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.3em;">🔐</div>
        <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.68em;color:#EF9090;line-height:1.25;">ทีม IT<br>/ Security</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.6em;color:#406070;line-height:1.25;">ลดความเสี่ยง<br>Credential · PII</div>
      </div>

      <div style="background:rgba(239,83,80,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(239,83,80,0.18);border-radius:9px;padding:0.45em 0.4em;text-align:center;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:0.15em;">
```
